description: Editable run-sheet JSON for character reference locking and direction variants on Comfy Cloud Standard.
recommendedModel: Flux Kontext Pro or another stable img2img-capable partner model
goal: Create four-direction unit source frames while preserving the approved pilot character identity.

inputs.poseGuide: optional line pose, depth guide, or prior accepted direction frame

defaults.controlMode: canny or depth when silhouette drift appears
defaults.seedStrategy: reuse the south anchor seed family and only branch when a direction fails repeatedly

operatorChecklist: Approve a full-body reference sheet before creating any direction variant.
Create south-facing anchor first, then east, west, and north.
Generate keyframes for idle, attack, cast, hit, and defeat before move frames.
Do not atlas-pack until the four-direction set passes the 128x128 readability QA.
